title: Senior Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET-2)
description:
**Company Description** 





 CoreShield Technologies, founded in 2023 and incubated at IIT Delhi by IIM alumni, is a deep\\-tech AI startup advancing real\\-time intelligence solutions for the defense sector and civilian enterprises. Recognized as a winner of the iDEX challenge by the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, the company is dedicated to strengthening India's defense capabilities through cutting\\-edge AI tools for situational awareness, decision\\-making, and operational readiness. CoreShield also pioneers dual\\-use technology, equipping enterprises and public institutions with intelligent surveillance and threat detection systems. With a focus on innovation, CoreShield is committed to building technology that safeguards the future both on battlefields and beyond.
 




  





**Role Description** 





 This is a full\\-time in office role for a Senior Software Development Engineer in Test \\- (SDET\\-2\\)
 

 Onsite role based in
 
**Bangalore** 

 . We are seeking a
 
**Senior SDET** 

 to lead the design and implementation of robust test frameworks and automation strategies for a complex full\\-stack application (frontend and backend). You will work closely with our development and DevOps teams to design, implement, and maintain robust test frameworks that ensure product quality and reliability in production environments.
 




  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Design and implement scalable, maintainable, and reusable automation frameworks
* Write, execute, and maintain test cases for RESTful APIs, message queues, and database interactions
* Define end\\-to\\-end, integration, regression, and API testing strategies
* Own quality assurance for critical service pipelines with CI/CD integration
* Collaborate with developers to ensure proper test coverage, edge case handling, and root cause analysis
* Perform load, performance, and regression testing in production\\-like environments
* Introduce and advocate best practices in software testing and test\\-driven development (TDD)



  





**Qualifications** 



* **4\\+ years** 

 of experience in software automation QA/testing with strong programming knowledge in Java and react.
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field
* Experience in Test Execution and Test Cases creation
* Proficiency in Software Testing and related methodologies
* Strong skills in Software Development, primarily focusing on UI Automation, API Testing and CI/CD integration.
* Hands\\-on experience with test frameworks like JUnit/TestNG, API testing tools like Postman/RestAssured etc.
* Knowledge of performance/load testing tools like JMeter or Gatling
* Solid understanding of HTTP, JSON, REST APIs, and backend service architecture
* Experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, etc.) and test automation in CI pipelines
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail
* Experience with Docker/Kubernetes environments
* Familiarity with security testing or compliance

title: Development Engineer 3
description:
Comcast brings together the best in media and technology. We drive innovation to create the world's best entertainment and online experiences. As a Fortune 50 leader, we set the pace in a variety of innovative and fascinating businesses and create career opportunities across a wide range of locations and disciplines. We are at the forefront of change and move at an amazing pace, thanks to our remarkable people, who bring cutting\\-edge products and services to life for millions of customers every day. If you share in our passion for teamwork, our vision to revolutionize industries and our goal to lead the future in media and technology, we want you to fast\\-forward your career at Comcast.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 Job Description Summary The Senior Software Engineer – Data Center Network Tooling designs and builds software platforms, automation, and services that enable reliable, scalable, and efficient operation of the data center network. This role focuses on developing internal tools that abstract network complexity, enable self\\-service, improve observability, and reduce operational risk. The engineer works closely with network engineering, SRE, security, and infrastructure teams to translate networking requirements into robust, production\\-grade software systems.
   

  

**Job Description**
**EXPERIENCE Level: 5 to 7\\.5 Years
   

  

 Location: Chennai**
 Primary Skills: Python, Django, SQL, CICD,Devops.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Software Design \\& Development**
* Design, develop, and maintain software platforms and services that manage and automate data center network infrastructure
* Build APIs, workflows, and user\\-facing tools that enable self\\-service provisioning and change management
* Develop reliable, testable, and well\\-documented code following modern software engineering best practices
* Participate in architecture and design reviews for network tooling and platforms


**Network Automation \\& Platforms**
* Translate network design and operational requirements into scalable software solutions
* Build and maintain automation for configuration management, validation, and deployment
* Implement infrastructure\\-as\\-code and configuration\\-as\\-code patterns for network systems
* Integrate tooling with CI/CD pipelines and change control processes


**Observability \\& Reliability**
* Build systems that improve network visibility, telemetry ingestion, and proactive alerting
* Enable data\\-driven insights into performance, capacity, and failure domains
* Partner with SRE and operations teams to improve MTTR and reduce incident recurrence
* Ensure tools are resilient, scalable, and secure in production environments


**Cross\\-Functional Collaboration**
* Partner with network engineers to model network intent, topology, and policy in software
* Collaborate with security teams to ensure tooling aligns with access controls and compliance requirements
* Work with platform, cloud, and application teams to integrate network services into broader infrastructure ecosystems


**Technical Leadership**
* Lead by example in code quality, system design, and operational ownership
* Mentor junior engineers and contribute to engineering standards and best practices
* Drive technical decisions that balance speed, reliability, and long\\-term maintainability


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
* 5\\+ to 7\\.5 years of professional software engineering experience
* Strong proficiency in one or more programming languages (e.g., Python, Go, Java, or similar)
* Experience building distributed systems, APIs, or internal developer platforms
* Familiarity with networking concepts (TCP/IP, routing, switching, DNS, load balancing)
* Experience with automation frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and version control systems
* Strong understanding of testing, code reviews, and production operations


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience building software for network automation or infrastructure platforms
* Familiarity with data center networking technologies (EVPN/VXLAN, BGP, spine\\-leaf architectures)
* Experience integrating with network devices, controllers, or vendor APIs
* Knowledge of telemetry, time\\-series data, and monitoring systems
* Experience with cloud and hybrid infrastructure environments
* Exposure to infrastructure security and access control models


**Core Competencies**
* Product\\-minded approach to internal tooling
* Strong systems and architectural thinking
* Ability to translate complex infrastructure problems into software abstractions
* Clear written and verbal communication across engineering disciplines
* Ownership mindset and operational accountability


 Comcast is an equal opportunity workplace. We will consider all qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, genetic information, or any other basis protected by applicable law.
   

  

 Base pay is one part of the Total Rewards that Comcast provides to compensate and recognize employees for their work. Most sales positions are eligible for a Commission under the terms of an applicable plan, while most non\\-sales positions are eligible for a Bonus. Additionally, Comcast provides best\\-in\\-class Benefits to eligible employees. We believe that benefits should connect you to the support you need when it matters most, and should help you care for those who matter most. That’s why we provide an array of options, expert guidance and always\\-on tools, that are personalized to meet the needs of your reality \\- to help support you physically, financially and emotionally through the big milestones and in your everyday life. Please visit the compensation and benefits summary on our careers site for more details.
   

  

**Education**
 Bachelor's Degree
   

  

 While possessing the stated degree is preferred, Comcast also may consider applicants who hold some combination of coursework and experience, or who have extensive related professional experience.
   

  

**Relevant Work Experience**
 5\\-7 Years

 As a Developer on our Shotscope™ team, you will help build and maintain industrial\\-grade manufacturing intelligence software used by customers worldwide. You will implement features and components on a .NET and Azure\\-based full stack, contribute clean and reliable code, and support the continuous evolution of a mission\\-critical product that connects machines, processes, and data.

* Ensure individual contributions meet Definition of Ready (DoR) and Definition of Done (DoD) criteria.

**Incident \\& Operational Support**

**Collaboration \\& Growth**

****Qualifications****
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 4\\+ years’ professional experience in software development.
* Proficiency in .NET technologies (C\\#, ASP.NET Core, SQL, .NET Framework, Entity Framework).
* Strong grasp of Agile methodologies, DevOps principles, application security and version control systems (e.g., Azure DevOps).
* Proficiency in modern front\\-end frameworks (e.g., preference: React; Angular).
* Clean Code Development and working experience with Unit Testing, and Test\\-driven Development.
* Familiarity with source code version control, branching strategies, CI/CD pipelines and other DevOps practices.
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
* Fluency in English (spoken and written).
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.


**Assets**
* Familiarity with CI/CD and pipelines.
* Experience using AI‑assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.
* Familiarity with Microsoft Azure, with experience in leveraging key services (e.g., Azure App Services, Azure Functions).
* Exposure to Microsoft SQL Server BI stack, including SSAS (OLAP cube design), SSRS (report development), and SSIS (ETL processes and data integration).


**Why Husky?**
* Regulated Working Hours: Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\\-being.
* Visible Impact: Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.
* Strategic Influence: Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.
* Empowered Involvement: Take an active role in decision\\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.
* Valued Contributions: Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.
* Impactful Role: Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.
* Cutting\\-Edge Projects: Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.
* Supportive Community: Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.
* Collaborative Environment: Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.


 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.

**Required Qualifications**

 Core Java Expertise: Exceptional proficiency in modern Java (Java 11/17/21\\) and the JVM ecosystem.
   

  

 Frameworks: Deep, practical experience with Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Hibernate/JPA, and related enterprise frameworks.
   

  

 System Architecture: Strong understanding of Microservices, SOA, RESTful API design, GraphQL, and Event\\-Driven Architecture (EDA).
   

  

 Cloud \\& Infrastructure: Proven experience designing systems on major cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure). Familiarity with serverless concepts is a plus.
   

  

 Databases: Extensive knowledge of both relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra, Redis) databases, including database modeling and query optimization.
   

  

 Messaging Systems: Experience with message brokers and event streaming platforms such as Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ, or ActiveMQ.
   

  

 Soft Skills: Excellent problem\\-solving abilities, strong communication skills, and the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non\\-technical audiences.
   

  

**Preferred Skills (Nice To Have)**

 Familiarity with modern frontend ecosystems (React, Angular, or Vue.js) to understand full\\-stack integration points.
   

  

 Cloud Architecture Certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect).
   

  

 Understanding of Domain\\-Driven Design (DDD) and Test\\-Driven Development (TDD) practices.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities

****Job Description****

 As a Senior Engineer in our Platform Engineering team, you’ll work hands‑on on the Azure cloud platform, developing and evolving Infrastructure‑as‑Code, CI/CD pipelines, and shared platform services that enable teams to deliver software faster, safer, and more consistently. You’ll own complex platform components, ensure reliability, security, and automation, and help keep our cloud foundations robust as they scale.

****Responsibilities****
**Technical Implementation**
* Understand and implement solutions based on the defined LLD (low level design).
* Own complex implementations at component/module level.
* Ensure correctness, performance, security, and maintainability of delivered solutions.
* Make sound technical decisions within assigned scope, escalating broader design concerns as needed.


**Delivery \\& Execution Excellence**
* Translate approved requirements and designs into working software.
* Break down assigned features into actionable tasks.
* Provide reliable estimates for owned work.
* Deliver high\\-quality increments aligned with sprint goals.

**Quality, Standards \\& Engineering Practices**

* Participate in meaningful code reviews.
* Ensure adherence to DoR (Definition of Ready) and DoD (Definition of Done) criteria.

**Incident \\& Operational Support**

* Contribute to root cause analysis and long\\-term fixes.

**Collaboration \\& Mentorship**

****Qualifications****

* Strong hands\\-on Azure platform engineering background, with proven ability to design and evolve shared platform capabilities that enable multiple dev/product teams.
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC) lifecycle expertise: able to design, review, and maintain IaC repositories and patterns as a productized capability for others (not “one\\-off scripts”).
